title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Reliance Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Reliance Industries
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
